vocab.meaning: hợp thời trang, có tư duy nhạy bén về xu hướng
vocab.example: While I strive to be fashion-forward, I refuse to wear shoes that cause me physical agony.

vocab.meaning: khả năng hỗ trợ vòm bàn chân
vocab.example: I strictly look for footwear with excellent arch support to prevent any long-term foot strain.
I try to strike a balance between style and comfort, though I often lean toward the latter for daily errands.

vocab.meaning: vẻ thanh lịch giản dị, không phô trương
vocab.example: I prefer loafers that exude a sense of understated elegance without being as restrictive as formal dress shoes.
In a tropical climate, shoes made of breathable material are a necessity for all-day comfort.
Beyond just looks, I prioritize durability and craftsmanship, as I want my investment to last for years.

vocab.meaning: tôn lên/phối hợp tốt với bộ trang phục
vocab.example: I occasionally endure a bit of discomfort if a pair of shoes perfectly complements an outfit for a high-profile event.

vocab.meaning: giày dép chú trọng công năng/tính hữu dụng
vocab.example: My wardrobe is mostly comprised of functional footwear that can withstand long hours of walking.

vocab.meaning: đắt đỏ đến mức vô lý
vocab.example: I find it hard to justify paying an exorbitant price for designer heels that are notoriously painful to wear.

vocab.meaning: tính linh hoạt (có thể dùng trong nhiều hoàn cảnh)
vocab.example: The versatility of classic white sneakers is unmatched, as they offer both a trendy look and a cozy feel.
